description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design, featuring extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors on multiple sides. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden paneling, complemented by sections of light-colored brickwork at the base. The structure is composed of two main volumes, one larger and one smaller, with the larger section housing a spacious open-plan area. A private backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by a manicured lawn and a paved patio area. The front entrance is recessed and accessible via a set of wide concrete steps, while the rear facade opens directly onto the pool area. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open space and natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass windows, wood paneling, and a backyard pool, designed in a minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and wood paneling.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick base, wood cladding, and fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with direct access to the backyard, visible pool, and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, lawn, and the solid wood-paneled volume.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped floor-to-ceiling windows
